name: Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter and flour a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
3. Cream the butter until light.
4. Slowly add the sugar and beat until incorporated.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Mix in the flour, salt, and vanilla or mace.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
9. Allow cooling in the pan for 5 minutes before turning out onto a rack.
10. Serve very thin slices.
